item.title: 【Linux】08 - File System
item.author: xxx@example.com (CialloKing)
item.description:
【Linux】08 - File System

Author: CialloKing(xxx@example.com)

The author was too lazy to write an English version—feel free to check out the Chinese version instead. (Yes, the author is that lazy.)
